mapper.insert:
insert into cost_result_ledger ( result_id, task_id, task_no, scene_id, version_id, fee_id, fee_code, fee_name, biz_no, bill_month, object_dimension, object_code, object_name, quantity_value, unit_price, amount_value, currency_code, result_status, trace_id ) values
( #{item.resultId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.taskNo}, #{item.sceneId}, #{item.versionId}, #{item.feeId}, #{item.feeCode}, #{item.feeName}, #{item.bizNo}, #{item.billMonth}, #{item.objectDimension}, #{item.objectCode}, #{item.objectName}, #{item.quantityValue}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amountValue}, #{item.currencyCode}, #{item.resultStatus}, #{item.traceId} )
mapper.select: select count(1) as resultCount, count(distinct task_id) as taskCount, count(distinct trace_id) as traceCount, sum(case when result_status is not null and result_status != 'SUCCESS' then 1 else 0 end) as abnormalCount, coalesce(sum(amount_value), 0) as amountTotal from cost_result_ledger

select fee_code as feeCode, max(fee_name) as feeName, count(1) as resultCount, coalesce(sum(amount_value), 0) as amountTotal from cost_result_ledger
group by fee_code order by amountTotal desc, resultCount desc limit 8

select coalesce(nullif(object_dimension, ''), '未设置') as objectDimension, count(distinct object_code) as objectCount, count(1) as resultCount, coalesce(sum(amount_value), 0) as amountTotal from cost_result_ledger
group by coalesce(nullif(object_dimension, ''), '未设置') order by resultCount desc, amountTotal desc limit 8
